---
# =============================================================================
# DUAL-FORMAT QUARTO TEMPLATE (PDF via Typst + HTML site)
# One Markdown source -> two outputs. See README.md for the effect->file map.
# =============================================================================

project:
  resources:
    - "assets/" # copy the whole assets/ dir into the build output
filters:
  - inline.lua # rewrites custom classes into Typst for the PDF

format:
# ---- PDF (Typst engine) ----
  typst:
    include-in-header: style.typ # component functions + type/heading styles
    include-before-body: layout.typ # document-level setup (code, figures, math)
    font-paths: ["assets/fonts"] # bundled TTFs so the PDF is reproducible
    papersize: a4
    number-sections: false
    toc: false
    highlight-style: tango
    # ---- HTML site ----
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: right
    page-layout: article
    format-links: false
    other-links: # adds a "PDF" download link in the sidebar
      - text: PDF
        href: index.pdf
        icon: file-pdf
    theme:
      light: minimal # light/dark Bootswatch themes + our overrides
      dark: darkly
    css: styles.css
    highlight-style:
      light: tango
      dark: dracula
      # CSL is HTML-only: Quarto fetches this URL for the web build. Typst can't
      # open a remote CSL, so the PDF uses Typst's built-in numeric bibliography.
    csl: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/ieee.csl

    # ---- Document-level (applies to BOTH formats) ----
bibliography: references.bib
title-block-style: none # we hand-build the cover instead
link-citations: true
---

<!-- =========================================================================
     COVER / TITLE
     The PDF gets a full-bleed Typst title page; the HTML gets a hero banner.
     `.content-visible when-format=...` is the core switch for format-specific
     content. Edit the title/subtitle/author in BOTH branches.
     ========================================================================= -->

::: {.content-visible when-format="typst"}
```{=typst}
// Full-bleed cover page with a background image.
#page(
  margin: 0pt,
  background: image("assets/hero-bg.svg", width: 100%, height: 100%, fit: "cover"),
  [
    // Logo, pinned top-right (white variant reads on the dark background)
    #place(top + right, dx: -40pt, dy: 40pt)[
      #image("assets/logo-white.svg", width: 70pt)
    ]

    // Title block, placed ~25% down the page
    #place(top + left, dy: 25%)[
      #block(
        width: 100%,
        fill: rgb(0, 0, 0, 100),   // translucent scrim so text stays legible
        inset: (top: 40pt, bottom: 50pt, left: 40pt, right: 40pt),
      )[
        #text(size: 28pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb(255, 255, 255))[
          Report Title Goes Here
        ]
        #v(10pt)
        #text(size: 16pt, fill: rgb(255, 255, 255, 220))[
          A concise, descriptive subtitle for your report
        ]
        #v(20pt)
        #grid(
            columns: 2,
            align: horizon,
            gutter: 1.2em, 
            box(
              fill: rgb(255, 255, 255, 40), 
              inset: (x: 12pt, y: 8pt), 
              radius: 6pt, 
              link("mailto:you@example.com")[#text(fill: white, weight: "bold")[Your Name]]
            ),
            text(fill: rgb("#ffffffb8"), size: 11pt)[Role / Affiliation]
          )
      ]
    ]

    // Background credit, pinned bottom-left
    #place(bottom + left, dx: 30pt, dy: -15pt)[
      #text(size: 8pt, fill: rgb(255, 255, 255, 150))[
        Background: your image credit here
      ]
    ]
  ]
)

// Reset the page counter so the body starts at page 1
#counter(page).update(1)
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
```{=html}
<div class="hero-banner">
  <div class="hero-banner-title">
    Report Title Goes Here
  </div>
  <div class="hero-banner-subtitle">
    A concise, descriptive subtitle for your report
  </div>

  <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.8em; font-size: 0.95em;">
    <div class="hero-author-box">
      <a href="mailto:you@example.com" class="hero-author-link">Your Name</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-author-text">Your Role / Affiliation</div>
  </div>

  <img src="assets/logo-white.svg" class="hero-logo">
  <div class="hero-credit">Background: your image credit here</div>
</div>
```
:::

## Executive Summary {.unnumbered}

{{< include _summary.qmd >}}

::: {.content-visible when-format="typst"}
```{=typst}
// Injects the Table of Contents directly into this spot
#pagebreak()
#outline(title: heading(level: 2, outlined: false, numbering: none)[Table of Contents], depth: 2)
#pagebreak()
```
:::

## Component Gallery

{{< include _components.qmd >}}

## Media: Images, Dark Mode & Embeds

{{< include _media.qmd >}}

## Tables, Math & Code

{{< include _tables_math_code.qmd >}}

## Native Quarto Constructs

{{< include _native.qmd >}}

## Acknowledgements {.unnumbered}

{{< include _acknowledgements.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
